channel.title: Newslogger | Bitroot
channel.description: Thoughts, tutorials, and insights from the Bitroot team.

item.title: Tweet curates 10 design sites for quick weekend reference
item.description:
A recent tweet lists ten free or low‑cost design sites, from wireframe generators to font libraries, giving engineers a ready‑made stash of UI assets for fast prototyping.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2055922458876608947

item.title: Notion releases ntn CLI for terminal API access
item.description:
Notion's new ntn command‑line tool puts the full Notion API into your terminal and adds a workflow for building and deploying Workers.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2054594852818764178

item.title: Claude Code weekly limits rise 50% for Pro and Enterprise users
item.description:
Claude Code weekly limits are increasing 50%, now through July 13. Live now for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise users.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2054639777685934564

item.title: Cline SDK open‑sourced as npm package
item.description:
Cline has released its SDK on npm, letting developers embed the same extension harness used in its coding agent. The package can be added with a single install command.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2054580767779700775

item.title: AiToEarn offers a free open‑source Hootsuite alternative
item.description:
AiToEarn is a full‑AI content‑marketing agent that can publish to 14 platforms with one Docker command, challenging paid SaaS tools at no cost.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2054531959528079430

item.title: Lovable launches SEO feature with auto pre‑rendering and one‑click fixes
item.description:
Lovable adds server‑side rendering and an on‑demand SEO review that can auto‑fix suggestions, aiming to make new and existing apps more discoverable.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2054549753224937956

item.title: scrcpy 4.0 adds flexible display mode for Android mirroring
item.description:
scrcpy 4.0 is out 🚀 Try the new flex display feature (and more): https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/releases/tag/v4.0

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2054463213022929032

item.title: Claude Code adds a /goal command for persistent task handling
item.description:
How do you keep Claude working until the job is done? Claude Code helps with this in a few ways, including one we shipped recently: /goal.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2054351031279186040

item.title: Claude Code introduces an agent view listing all sessions
item.description:
New in Claude Code: agent view. One list of all your sessions, available today as a research preview.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2053940934736228454

item.title: Cloudflare agents can now self‑provision accounts, buy domains, and deploy
item.description:
"Agents can now create Cloudflare accounts, buy domains, and deploy" Here's how it works in 4 minutes.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2052029139775787314

item.title: Claude partners with SpaceX to raise API usage limits
item.description:
Claude announced a partnership with SpaceX that expands its compute pool, allowing higher usage caps for Claude Code and the Claude API. Engineers can now run larger prompts without hitting current limits, but pricing stays token‑based.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2052060691893227611

item.title: Claude Managed Agents launches dreaming mode and beta orchestration
item.description:
Live from Code with Claude: we're launching dreaming in Claude Managed Agents as a research preview. Outcomes, multiagent orchestration, and webhooks are now in public beta.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2052067399088664981

item.title: Google launches Pomelli Catalog for AI-generated brand campaigns
item.description:
Google's new Pomelli Catalog lets you feed product data and instantly receive AI-crafted campaign copy and photos, free of charge.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2051693177053340073

item.title: Open Design Skills released as open-source design system
item.description:
Nexu has open‑sourced its Open Design Skills library, a ready‑made system for turning raw HTML into polished, magazine‑grade pages. It could speed up landing‑page iterations for small teams.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2051203959142895896

item.title: Higgsfield releases CLI with built‑in marketing skill
item.description:
Higgsfield AI adds a command‑line tool that bundles a marketing skill, aiming to keep LLM token spend low while improving output quality.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2051346056039039487

item.title: Hermes Agent gains Hyperframes video-editing skill
item.description:
HeyGen added a Hyperframes skill to Hermes Agent, letting developers turn the agent into a one‑command video editor. The integration is a joint effort with Nous Research and is installable via a single CLI line.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2051697813554405384

item.title: GitHub Projects releases browser‑only PDF toolkit with 90+ tools
item.description:
GitHub Projects unveiled an open‑source PDF toolkit that runs fully in the browser via WebAssembly, offering more than 90 utilities without any server component.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2051598119478108162

item.title: SubQ launches a sub‑quadratic LLM with 12M‑token context
item.description:
SubQ’s new model uses a sub‑quadratic sparse‑attention design to handle 12 million‑token contexts, delivering speed and cost advantages over existing attention engines.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2051663268704636937

item.title: OpenClaude v0.9.1 makes Codex default and upgrades to GPT‑5.5
item.description:
Promised fulfilled! Codex is now the default provider and GPT 5.5 is the default model of OpenClaude. v0.9.1 released with big updates! 🔥 Thank you Sam

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2051616716007075887

item.title: Claude Code adds built‑in skill for Claude Platform tasks
item.description:
Claude Code now includes a built‑in skill that can manage model migrations, use prompt caching, and interact with Claude Managed Agents directly from the CLI.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2049575802568839648

item.title: Poseidon opens early access to Numo for multilingual voice data collection
item.description:
Poseidon released an early‑access version of Numo, an app that gathers voice recordings in four South Asian languages to feed next‑generation AI models. The rollout is limited and invites scrutiny over data quality and privacy.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2049526025751855207

item.title: Fal WebGL demo serves sub‑megabyte animated GLBs in seconds
item.description:
A new Fal‑powered WebGL demo shows how to turn AI‑generated images into animated GLB assets under 1 MB, using a fully static front‑end.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2049836416289407133

item.title: ElevenLabs launches 50+ pre‑configured Agent Templates
item.description:
ElevenLabs added Agent Templates, a library of more than 50 ready‑made ElevenAgents for support, sales, and operations. The templates bundle prompts, workflows, and integrations to speed up deployment.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2048794727881789930

item.title: HyperFrames lets you generate videos from HTML, CSS, and JS
item.description:
HyperFrames is a free, open‑source Agent Skill that turns web code into video, working with any LLM. It’s a quick way to prototype visual output without buying a dedicated service.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2048779120985645145

item.title: Dot Matrix adds 55+ free React dot‑matrix loaders
item.description:
Dot Matrix is a React component library of dot matrix loaders—expressive loading primitives you install via the shadcn registry and own as local code.

Source:

  • https://dotmatrix.zzzzshawn.cloud/

item.title: Anything adds AI‑generated App Store screenshots
item.description:
BREAKING: the screenshot bottleneck is gone! Anything now generates designer grade App Store screenshots

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2047782953959170239

item.title: Anthropic pilots Claude‑run marketplace for office supplies
item.description:
Anthropic's new internal experiment lets its AI assistant Claude buy, sell, and negotiate items for employees, revealing both promise and practical concerns for startup teams.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2047728360818696302

item.title: VS Code ships a virtual pet extension
item.description:
Add a little fun to your coding sessions 🐶🐱 This extension lets you keep a virtual pet right inside VS Code.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2047314929695310196

item.title: DeepSeek V4‑Pro pricing looks cheap next to GPT‑5.5
item.description:
A recent tweet highlights that DeepSeek V4‑Pro charges $1.74 per million input tokens, far below the $5‑$30 rates announced for GPT‑5.5, raising questions about cost strategy for startups.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2047605548346941643

item.title: Free open-source AI video clipping tool challenges $49/month services
item.description:
A new AI‑powered, self‑hosted clipper can process YouTube and local videos without watermarks, and it’s completely free. It even lets you plug in Claude or any other model.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2047366820026593444

item.title: Gemma 4 runs offline with LM Studio and OpenCode
item.description:
Google's Gemma 4 model can be executed entirely on a local machine using LM Studio and OpenCode, letting engineers parse PDFs and build sites without network access.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2047406475631624285

item.title: GitHub Copilot now runs OpenAI GPT‑5.5
item.description:
OpenAI’s GPT‑5.5 is generally available and has been baked into GitHub Copilot, promising better results on complex coding tasks. Engineers can test it via Copilot CLI or the @code UI, but should weigh cost and false‑positive risk.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2047747243617460482

item.title: Nvidia launches free hosted APIs for ~80 AI models
item.description:
Nvidia now provides free access to around 80 large language models via hosted APIs, with a simple key‑based setup. Engineers can experiment without paying for inference.

Source:

  • https://x.com/dhruvtwt_/status/2047006444701274380

item.title: Claude blog outlines how agents should use MCP, APIs, and CLIs
item.description:
Claude’s new blog post details when to prefer direct APIs, CLIs, or the Model‑Centric Programming layer for production‑grade agents, and shares concrete server‑client patterns.

Source:

  • https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2047086372666921217?s=20

item.title: Revolutionary Infinite-Canvas IDE Nyx Unveiled
item.description:
Kraggi's Nyx is a game-changing infinite-canvas IDE that integrates multiple AI models, streamlining coding and development. This innovative platform is set to transform the way developers work.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2046827332124430774

item.title: Revolutionizing Productivity: Parallel Agents Unleashed
item.description:
Zed's Parallel Agents is a game-changer for developers, allowing multiple agents to run simultaneously, streamlining workflows and boosting productivity. This innovation is set to transform the way we work on projects.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2047004387961106435

item.title: Revolutionizing Code Review: Claude Code Unveils Ultrareview
item.description:
Claude Code introduces Ultrareview, a game-changing feature that harnesses the power of cloud-based bug-hunting agents to streamline code review. This innovation promises to simplify the development process and improve code quality.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2046999435239133246

item.title: Unlocking Hidden Traffic: Okara's SEO Hack for Organic Growth
item.description:
Discover Okara's favorite SEO hack to boost organic traffic by optimizing pages with high impressions and low click-through rates. Learn how to leverage this strategy for your own website

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2046866025795461145

item.title: Revolutionizing Web Scraping: Firecrawl's Game-Changing Update
item.description:
Firecrawl's latest update enables effortless monitoring of entire sites for pricing changes, doc updates, or inventory shifts, making it a game-changer for developers and tech enthusiasts

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2046982541245321671

item.title: Revolutionizing Visual Creation: ChatGPT Images 2.0 Unleashed
item.description:
OpenAI's ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a game-changer for visual creation, offering advanced image generation capabilities with sharper editing and richer layouts. This breakthrough technology has the potential to revolutionize various industries, from graphic design to entertainment.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2046670977145372771

item.title: Revolutionizing Productivity: OpenAI Unveils Shared Workspace Agents in ChatGPT
item.description:
Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT—shared agents that can handle complex tasks and long-running workflows across tools and teams.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2047008987665809771

item.title: ClaudeDevs Unveils Dedicated Channel for Developer Updates
item.description:
For the developers building with Claude, a direct line from the team. Follow for changelogs, API releases, community updates, and deep dives.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2044780198722498580

item.title: The Future of Coding: Is the Era of Traditional IDEs Coming to an End?
item.description:
A new masterclass reveals how Anthropic uses Claude Code, a revolutionary tool that could make traditional IDEs obsolete by the end of the year, and explores non-coding pipeline opportunities

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2044140545384296913

item.title: Revolutionizing Voice AI: ElevenLabs Unveils Game-Changing React SDK
item.description:
The New ElevenAgents React SDK

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2044519924282847381

item.title: Revolutionizing Automation: Claude Code Routines Are Here
item.description:
Claude Code Routines have arrived, allowing users to trigger templated agents via GitHub events or API, streamlining documentation and backlog maintenance. This innovation has the potential to transform the way developers work.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2044093913376706655

item.title: Revolutionizing AI-Powered Workflows: Google Introduces Skills in Chrome
item.description:
Google introduces Skills in Chrome, a game-changer for building one-click workflows with AI prompts, and we're excited to dive into its implications for developers and tech enthusiasts. This innovation has the potential to streamline tasks and boost productivity like never before.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2044106378655215625

item.title: Revolutionizing AI-Powered Coding: Claude's Game-Changing Update
item.description:
We've redesigned Claude Code on desktop. You can now run multiple Claude sessions side by side from one window, with a new sidebar to manage them all.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2044131493966909862

item.title: Revolutionizing App Design: AI-Generated Themes Now Available
item.description:
Gemini now generates designs for your apps while they’re building! pick between 5 themes, hit apply, and get beautiful designs out of the box. now live in AI Studio

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2044111418786754620

item.title: Revolutionizing Video Consumption: Interactive Transcripts Are Here
item.description:
I can't go back to the regular YouTube UI after this 😅 Obsidian Reader now makes the transcript interactive so you can scrub, highlight, auto-scroll. It feels so nice.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2042683393247449148

item.title: Revolutionizing AI Agents: MiniMax Unveils MMX-CLI for Enhanced Capabilities
item.description:
MiniMax introduces MMX-CLI, a groundbreaking infrastructure that empowers AI agents with seven new senses, revolutionizing their capabilities and potential applications. This update is a game-changer for developers and the tech community, enabling agents to interact with the world in unprecedented ways.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2042641521653256234

item.title: Revolutionizing Agent Interactions: Claude's Monitor Tool Unveiled
item.description:
Noah Zweben announces the Monitor tool, a game-changer for Claude's background scripts, and we're excited to dive into its potential. This innovation promises to reduce token usage and move away from polling in the agent loop.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2042332268450963774

item.title: Revolutionizing Security Triage: GitHub Copilot CLI Is a Game-Changer
item.description:
GitHub Copilot CLI automates security triage, allowing devs to identify and address vulnerabilities quickly, and we're excited to share the implications of this update with the community. This tool is set to revolutionize the way developers tackle security debt, making it a must-know for anyone in the industry.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2042008695035355537

item.title: Revolutionizing AI Development: Claude Unveils Managed Agents
item.description:
Claude introduces Managed Agents, a game-changing platform for building and deploying AI agents at scale, streamlining the development process from prototype to launch. This innovation has the potential to transform the AI landscape, enabling faster and more efficient development of AI-powered applications.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2041927687460024721

item.title: Revolutionary Database Cloning: ArdentAI Changes the Game
item.description:
ArdentAI introduces instant Postgres database cloning, streamlining testing for developers and coding agents. This innovation reduces cloning time to under 6 seconds, eliminating infrastructure management.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2041651193362182281

item.title: Firecrawl Reaches New Heights: Revolutionizing Web Interaction for AI Agents
item.description:
Firecrawl has reached the top 100 GitHub repos, offering a game-changing API for AI agents to search, scrape, and interact with the web, trusted by over a million developers and thousands of enterprise teams. This milestone underscores the significance of Firecrawl's innovative approach to web interaction.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2041909075110510969

item.title: Notion Unleashes AI-Powered Task Automation with Claude Agents
item.description:
Notion introduces Claude AI agents to automate tasks and workflows, revolutionizing team productivity. This integration enables seamless task management and automation, making it a game-changer for developers and teams.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2041982872698155398

item.title: Revolutionizing AI Dev Tool Onboarding: Interactive Learning Comes to Claude Code
item.description:
Claude Code introduces a new /powerup command, bringing interactive lessons to the terminal, and marking the beginning of a new era in AI dev tool onboarding. This innovation is set to make AI development more accessible and user-friendly for developers.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2041542766585610477

item.title: Revolutionizing Software Security: Anthropic Unveils Project Glasswing
item.description:
Anthropic introduces Project Glasswing, an initiative to secure critical software using AI-powered vulnerability detection, and explores its potential to revolutionize the tech industry. This breakthrough has significant implications for developers and the broader tech community.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2041578392852517128

item.title: Supernotes 3.2.3 Revolution: Unlocking New Features and Enhancements
item.description:
The latest Supernotes update brings exciting new features, improvements, and bug fixes, taking user experience to the next level. Discover what's new and why it matters for developers and tech enthusiasts.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2041401159639007301

item.title: Revolutionizing Automation: Zapier SDK Now Open to All
item.description:
Zapier's SDK is now available to everyone, enabling AI agents to access over 8,000 apps and their APIs, and changing the game for automation and development. This launch opens up new possibilities for developers and tech enthusiasts to streamline workflows and unlock new use cases.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2041501747105890393

item.title: Revolutionizing Code Productivity: Autofix PR Now Available on Command Line
item.description:
The new /autofix-pr command line tool streamlines code fixes and boosts developer productivity. This game-changing feature allows for seamless session sharing and automated PR fixes.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2041654973491245509

item.title: Revolutionary AI Teacher: Clicky Buddy Changes the Game for Learning
item.description:
Meet Clicky, an AI-powered teacher that assists learners in real-time, and discover its potential to transform the way we acquire new skills. This cutting-edge tool is set to revolutionize the edtech landscape with its interactive and personalized approach.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2041314633978659092

item.title: Unlocking GitHub's Hidden Potential: A Personal Productivity Powerhouse
item.description:
GitHub is not just for coding, it can also power your daily life with its built-in task management features, discover how to set up your personal operating system. This game-changing approach can boost productivity and streamline daily tasks

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2040490839881720092

item.title: tldraw Revolution: Unlocking Next-Level Collaborative Diagramming
item.description:
In the next version of tldraw,

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2040869600137556247

item.title: Revolutionizing Font Pairing: Introducing Typevibe
item.description:
Typevibe is a game-changing tool that simplifies font pairing, offering unique recommendations and 32 design templates to streamline your design process. This innovative solution is a must-try for developers and designers alike.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2040969883236622484

item.title: Revolutionizing Design: Top Tools for Color and Gradient Selection
item.description:
Discover the top tools for picking colors and gradients, as shared by Albia, to take your design to the next level. From Coolors to Colorion, explore the best resources for designers and developers.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2040387276589682858

item.title: Revolutionizing Game Development with Omma's AI-Powered Tools
item.description:
Omma's AI-powered tools are changing the game development landscape with its level builder and controllable color theme parameters, allowing for unprecedented creativity and innovation. This technology has the potential to democratize game development and make it more accessible to developers of all levels.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2037935421905412229

item.title: Revolutionizing Productivity: Claude's Game-Changing Update
item.description:
Claude's latest update enables the AI to use your computer to complete tasks, opening up new possibilities for automation and efficiency. This breakthrough feature is set to revolutionize the way we work and interact with our devices.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2036195789601374705

item.title: Rust-Powered Agent-Browser Revolution: Lightning-Fast Performance and Tiny Footprint
item.description:
The agent-browser is now fully native Rust, boasting a 1.6x faster cold start, 18x less memory, and a 99x smaller install, making it a game-changer for developers. This update brings faster shipping, more control, and unprecedented capabilities to the table.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2032635370089693456

item.title: Revolutionary Coding: Claude Code Desktop Unveils Game-Changing Frontend Preview
item.description:
Claude Code Desktop has a built-in MCP for frontend preview It activates automatically when you ask Claude to spin up a dev server Save this thread 👇

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2032856141059747975

item.title: Revolutionizing AI Workflows: GLM-5 Unleashes Agent Mode
item.description:
GLM-5 introduces Agent Mode, a game-changer for AI workflows, allowing for instant insights and automated tasks. This update is a must-know for developers and tech enthusiasts looking to streamline their workflows.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2032555220493033960

item.title: YC's Startup School Lands in India: A Boost for Local Entrepreneurs
item.description:
Y Combinator's Startup School is coming to India, featuring talks from successful founders and sessions with YC partners, and this is a huge opportunity for local entrepreneurs to learn and grow. This event is a must-attend for anyone looking to launch or scale a startup in India.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2032291152402255892

item.title: Revolutionizing Pixel Art: A Node-Based VFX Editor Emerges
item.description:
Pixel Composer : un éditeur VFX à base de nodes pour le pixel art https://github.com/Ttanasart-pt/Pixel-Composer

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2032436603453395361

item.title: JetBrains Unveils Air: A Revolutionary AI-Powered Development Environment
item.description:
JetBrains introduces Air, an agentic development environment that supports top AI models, and we're excited to explore its potential for developers. This new tool is set to change the way we code and interact with AI assistants.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2031049359710650522

item.title: Breakthrough: Run AI Models Entirely in Your Browser with WebGPU
item.description:
Google AI Developers just revealed a game-changing update that enables running AI models like TranslateGemma 4B entirely in your browser, and we're excited to dive into the implications. This breakthrough uses WebGPU and Transformers.js v4 to support 55 languages offline, with no server required.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2031037128734376089

item.title: Reviving Mockdown: AI-Powered Wireframing Revolution
item.description:
Mockdown is alive again. AI agents read markdown better than they read your mind. Draw a wireframe in ASCII, paste it into Claude Code, get a working page back. http://www.mockdown.design

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2031152691502555592

item.title: Revolutionizing Code Quality: Claude's AI-Powered Code Review Unleashed
item.description:
Introducing Code Review, a new feature for Claude Code. When a PR opens, Claude dispatches a team of agents to hunt for bugs.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2031088171262554195

item.title: Revolutionizing Web APIs: Anything API Unleashed
item.description:
Anything API is live, filling the gap for websites without public APIs, and enabling developers to create callable endpoints for any website. This game-changing technology has the potential to transform the way we interact with the web.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2029106289528185211

item.title: Revolutionizing App Development: AI-Powered Glaze Launches
item.description:
Today we're launching Glaze 💠 Create any desktop app in minutes by chatting with AI. Beautiful, powerful, and truly personal. Learn more on https://glazeapp.com Follow @glazeapps for updates.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2029180822838759703

item.title: Revolutionizing Team Collaboration: OpenAI Unveils Symphony
item.description:
OpenAI introduces Symphony, a game-changing platform that streamlines team collaboration by turning project work into isolated, autonomous implementation runs. This innovation has the potential to transform the way teams manage work and supervise coding agents.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2029296008572576217

item.title: Revolutionizing Agent Development: LangSmith Skills and CLI Unleashed
item.description:
LangChain introduces LangSmith Skills and CLI, empowering coding agents to take charge of their own development, and we're excited to dive into the implications and potential use cases. This breakthrough enables agents to debug, create datasets, and run experiments natively through the terminal.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2029272199073354105

item.title: Revolutionizing Affordable Computing: Apple Unveils the Groundbreaking MacBook Neo
item.description:
Apple today unveiled MacBook Neo, an all-new laptop that delivers the magic of the Mac at a breakthrough price.

Source:

  • https://share.google/Aoh06t6BFh9ZjAPJW

item.title: Apple Unleashes AI-Powered MacBook Pro with M5 Pro and M5 Max Chips
item.description:
Apple announced the latest 14- and 16-inch MacBook Pro with the all-new M5 Pro and M5 Max.

Source:

  • https://share.google/XBSpKN75sGxaqL1Mk

item.title: Revolutionary Voice Mode Rolls Out in Claude Code
item.description:
Claude Code introduces a game-changing voice mode, allowing users to interact with the platform using voice commands, and it's rolling out to 5% of users now. This innovative feature is set to revolutionize the coding experience.

Source:

  • https://x.com/trq212/status/2028628570692890800?s=20

item.title: Electron Apps Just Got a Whole Lot Smarter with Agent-Browser Integration
item.description:
Control and debug Electron apps like Discord, Figma, and VS Code with the new agent-browser skill, revolutionizing desktop app development and automation. This game-changing update opens up new possibilities for developers and power users alike.

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2028128730132922760

item.title: Revolutionizing Image Creation: Nano Banana 2 Unleashed
item.description:
We’re launching Nano Banana 2, built on the latest Gemini Flash model. 🍌 It’s state-of-the-art for creating and editing images, combining Pro-level capabilities with lightning-fast speed. 🧵

Source:

  • https://x.com/i/status/2027051577899380991

item.title: Revolutionizing Chatbot Development: Vercel's Game-Changing Chat SDK
item.description:
Vercel's new Chat SDK allows developers to write chatbot logic once and deploy across multiple platforms, streamlining development and increasing productivity. This innovation has the potential to revolutionize the way chatbots are built and integrated into various applications.

Source:
